text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, together with the other Umamusume, arrive at
Tracen Academy's seaside facilities for an intense summer training
camp.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I didn't think I'd sweat this much before even beginning our
training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our main objective for this camp is not leisure, but training. Yet
Matikanefukukitaru has brought with her a giant suitcase filled with...
something.
choice_data_list: I hope that isn't filled with what I think it is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I brought my lucky items with me! Or well, most of them at least. I left
about a hundred of them back in my dorm room. The rest are here
with me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to use this summer camp as an opportunity to say goodbye
to all my stuff. The question is, how do I go about doing it?
choice_data_list: How about just throwing it all out?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Throw it all out?! These are all my precious lucky items! Sure, I'm
getting rid of them, but I can't just throw them out like some common
garbage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, littering is bad. We'd get in trouble for tossing trash onto the
beach. I'll admit that I brought all my stuff here without much of a
plan in mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
These lucky items have served me well, so I'd like to give them a
proper send-off—but how?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru went from refusing to let go of her lucky items to
sending them off on her own. It appears she's gone through a change
of heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From where that change stems, I don't know. But regardless, it's
important that I take her feelings into consideration.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You will?! I'd really appreciate the help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of chirping crickets and crying cicadas fills the hot summer
air. Then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are! Be right there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru spots me and briskly jogs over to my side.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why are you here? Where even are we?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there's a little stream over there! I didn't know this area had a
river so close by. It really adds to the atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect place to play with a toy boat! Put it in the water
and see what happens! If it stays afloat, great fortunes await us! And
if it doesn't... no big deal!
choice_data_list: We're getting rid of your stuff here.
We're getting rid of your stuff here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Here? Ah, are you suggesting we send off my lucky items using
this river? I see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm... a river memorial. It'd be a fitting way to put my things to
rest—nice and traditional.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
River spirits, river lanterns, river ceremonies... Heck, we even eat
noodles out of tiny rivers! One of those is not like the others, but
they've all got to do with rivers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I think it's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can reflect on every one of my lucky items as I let them go and
hopefully become a better me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins Matikanefukukitaru's lucky item river send-off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Farewell, kiddy lunch flag... I was able to get good test scores back in
elementary school thanks to you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You were my motivation to study hard so Mom would take me out and
get a kiddy meal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suspect the real motivation was nothing more than her hungry
stomach, but I decide to remain silent as I watch her send off the flag
down the stream.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Next up is one of my most prized lucky items—this crumpled up
playing card.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I played using this card, I'd always win! Its iconic wrinkle
allowed me to seize victory by my own hands. Farewell, crumpled
card!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppress the urge to make a remark regarding her clearly fraudulent
antics, and Matikanefukukitaru releases the card into the water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She repeats this process with the remainder of her lucky items until...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Finally, this is the last one! This wooden doll was given to me by my
grandma. It's one of my most precious lucky items.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was always super shy and scared of just about everything. But my
grandma gave me this, telling me that she'd be watching over me no
matter where I am.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I'm all grown up now! I've finally moved on! So please, do the
honors by sending off my doll for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Grandma, I think I'll be fine on my own now! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Matikanefukukitaru's grandmother is proudly watching her
from the skies above.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to buy you a little something before I head back,
Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I retract my statement. I'm sure she's proud from the comfort of her
home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well, that's the last of it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I feel like a new person! And to top it all off, my room's finally all
clean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now all I need to do is take care not to cause any more trou— Wait a
second... Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've already caused a huge problem! This stream... It leads to the
ocean, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We just littered a bunch! Waaaah, what do we do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flustered Matikanefukukitaru panics, and we decide to follow the
stream down to its mouth.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh? Who put this metal grate here? It caught all my lucky items...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Did you do this for me? You really are prepared for anything, aren't
you? It's like you can read my mind!
choice_data_list:
How about we send off your stuff with a small
bonfire instead?

How about we send off your stuff with a small
bonfire instead?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! We can make a beachside campfire and burn
everything there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa... It's so pretty...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pile of burning lucky items emits a soft glow, illuminating the now
dark beach.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I still have some of my lucky items back in my dorm room, but I'm still
surprised that I was able to part with as much as I did...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I can completely give up my divinations or my lucky items
just yet, but... I think I'm starting to get the importance of using your
own power to do things.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm sure the great Shiraoki wouldn't approve of me solely
relying on her.
choice_data_list:
The great Shiraoki would be proud to see you
now.

The great Shiraoki would be proud to see you
now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... It sounds embarrassing when you put it like that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I know I'll be just fine! After all, I have the luckiest person right by
side.
choice_data_list: I'll do what I can to bring you good fortune.
I'll do what I can to bring you good fortune.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oho! I hope you mean that. I'm going to hold you to your word. I
expect lots of good luck in the near future, got it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My arms are wide open! Give me all the luck you've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure which is burning brighter—the blazing bonfire we made
together, or the fiery spirit within Matikanefukukitaru's newly
changed heart.
